headings.text: Bang & Olufsen Expands Customization with Atelier and Exclusive Limited Editions
Bang & Olufsen Expands Customization with Atelier and Exclusive Limited Editions
Beolab 90 Alchemy Edition – A Rare Collector’s Piece

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingBang & Olufsen Expands Customization with Atelier and Exclusive Limited EditionsPosted on February 19, 2025Bang & Olufsen Expands Customization with Atelier and Exclusive Limited EditionsBang & Olufsen has introduced Atelier, a new customization program that allows clients to create bespoke audio pieces in collaboration with master artisans in Struer, Denmark.The launch responds to growing demand for personalized, high-end sound systems, giving customers more control over the design and materials of their B&O products.‍‍Three Customization OptionsAtelier offers three levels of customization:Atelier Bespoke – A fully custom approach where clients work directly with an artisan to create a one-of-a-kind product using unique materials or finishes.Atelier Catalogue – A selection of over 500,000 possible combinations, letting customers mix and match fabric, wood, and aluminum finishes to design their own speaker.Atelier Editions – Limited-edition collections featuring some of B&O’s most iconic products, finished in exclusive colors and materials.‍‍The Beosound 2 Gradient CollectionTo mark the launch of Atelier, Bang & Olufsen has introduced the Atelier Limited Edition Beosound 2 Gradient Collection. This collection features ten distinct gradient finishes, each inspired by the emotional impact of sound. Every color is limited to ten pieces, all individually numbered and engraved.‍‍Beolab 90 Alchemy Edition – A Rare Collector’s PieceOne of the most striking Atelier Editions is the Beolab 90 Alchemy Edition, an ultra-limited release of just 50 pairs. Each set is individually numbered and crafted with 24-carat gold-plated components, bronze mesh covers, and walnut wood details. Created by the Atelier Bespoke team, this edition highlights Bang & Olufsen’s focus on craftsmanship and materials.Customization at Every LevelAtelier allows customers to tailor a range of B&O’s flagship products, including:Beolab 28 – Customizable aluminum core, wood and fabric outer cover, and inner textile.Beovision Harmony – Personalizable cover options in fabric, aluminum, and wood.Beolab 8 & Beolab 50 – Custom aluminum, wood, and fabric options.Beovision Theatre – Custom stand colors, top covers, and finishes.‍‍A Personalized ExperienceEvery Atelier Bespoke creation is finished at Bang & Olufsen’s Struer facility, where designers and engineers collaborate to bring custom designs to life. Clients can consult with specialists to fine-tune details, select materials, and create a product tailored to their space.For those looking for a truly unique statement piece, Atelier offers an opportunity to own a Bang & Olufsen product that exists nowhere else.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
